summary: iOS 🟥 TERN | INTERMITTENT | Primary earbud is not disconnected after placing it in charge case
scenario: Primary earbud remains connected after being placed in the charge case and lid is closed
description_clean: Primary earbud is not disconnected after placing it in the charge case and closing the lid. Steps: pair with Free 60 earbuds, place both in case and close, open case and take left earbud first, once connected take right earbud out, then place left earbud back in case and close. Observed: sometimes the primary earbud still shows as connected with charging icon, and no sound plays through it. Expected: putting earbud in the charge case and closing the lid should disconnect it.
steps: Place both earbuds in the charging case and close the lid
Open the case and take out the left earbud first
Once connected, take out the right earbud
Place the left earbud back in the charging case and close the lid
expected: Putting an earbud in the charging case and closing the lid should disconnect it.
actual: Sometimes the primary earbud still shows as connected with a charging icon, and no sound plays through it.
